name: Preset Agent Skills
description: AI agent skills for the Preset API — authenticate, discover workspaces, and inspect dashboards and datasets.

skills.name: preset-api
skills.description: Authenticate with the Preset Management API. Required by all other skills.

skills.name: preset-workspaces
skills.description: List Preset teams and workspaces, resolve workspace hostnames, and manage membership with confirmation.

skills.name: preset-dashboards
skills.description: Inspect dashboards, dashboard charts, and dashboard datasets.

skills.name: preset-datasets
skills.description: Inspect database connections, schemas, tables, datasets, columns, and metrics.
